# Hotel-Detail > Booking (MOBILE)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: nke-k7q-idt.json -->
<!-- viewport: mobile -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://www.stayforlong.com/hotel/es/hotel-barcelona-universal_barcelona
2. Click 'Elige tu habitación' button
3. Click 'Reserva' button
4. Enter 'Datadog Monitor' in name field
5. Enter 'Synthetics' in last name field
6. Enter 'monitoring@stayforlong.com' in email field
7. Enter '+34600000000' in phone number field
8. Click 'No, gracias' travel insurance option
9. Click submit button to proceed
10. Verify cardholder name input field is present
11. Verify card number input field is present
12. Verify confirmation button is present
